name: Pitfall!
description: Pitfall! is a side-scrolling platform game where the player controls Pitfall Harry, an adventurer, as he navigates through a jungle environment. The goal is to recover 32 treasures within a 20-minute time limit. Harry must avoid or overcome numerous hazards including pits, quicksand, rolling logs, fire, scorpions, cobras, and crocodiles. Harry can run, jump, and swing on vines to traverse the jungle. Some areas are underground passages, accessible by ladders, offering a faster, but potentially more dangerous, route. There are also points-scoring treasures scattered throughout the level. The game ends if Harry runs out of time or loses all his lives (starting with 3). Harry loses a life by touching a hazard or falling into a pit. Some hazards can be avoided, others require precise timing of jumps or swings. The game world is a continuous loop, meaning the end of the level connects back to the beginning.

controls.space: Jump. If Harry is near a vine, this will cause him to grab the vine and swing.
